message:
perf(headers): zero-alloc lookup for lowercase header names (bd-3slp)

Add lowercase_header_key() helper that returns Cow<str>:
- Borrows original string when already lowercase (fast path)
- Only allocates for mixed-case names (less common in practice)

Most programmatic header access uses lowercase literals like
"content-type", so this eliminates allocation in the common case.

Added 6 tests for the optimization and case-insensitive behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
